tickets.title: Kanban Board Improvement & Agent Monitoring
tickets.description: Improve the Kanban board design and functionality. Monitor agent activity. Fix any broken functionality.

comments.text: ✅ Mobile-first overhaul completed: single-column board with picker, swipe gestures, pull-to-refresh, light/dark theme toggle, offline detection, bottom sheet detail panel, larger touch targets, improved empty states.

tickets.title: Kanban v2: Pull-to-refresh, Theme Toggle, Empty States, Offline Detection
tickets.description: Add pull-to-refresh on mobile, light/dark mode toggle with persistence, improved empty states with illustrations, and offline connectivity detection banner.

comments.text: ✅ All features deployed: pull-to-refresh gesture, light/dark theme toggle with localStorage, improved empty states with emoji illustrations, offline detection banner.

tickets.title: Iris Jira↔Kanban Two-Way Sync System
tickets.description: Set up Iris agent to continuously sync Mission Control Kanban with Jira board in both directions. Kanban→Jira push + Jira→Kanban pull. Status, title, priority, assignee always in parity. Uses iris-sync.py script.

comments.text: 🔨 Creating Iris as dedicated Jira sync agent. Two-way sync script iris-sync.py created. Agent workspace at workers/iris/.
✅ Sync system operational. 30 Kanban tickets pushed to Jira (TD-68→TD-97). Two-way sync script iris-sync.py working. Parity check passing.

tickets.title: Board Quality Supervision & Parity Checks
tickets.description: Iris to run regular parity checks between Kanban and Jira. Flag orphaned tickets, inconsistent statuses, missing epics. Board quality report daily.

comments.text: ✅ Board quality supervision active. Parity check system working — verified 30/30 tickets match between Kanban and Jira.

tickets.title: Setup monitoring dashboards & alerting rules
tickets.description: Deploy monitoring agent for gateway, voice bot, disk, memory, CPU, ports, logs. Create alerting rules and notification channels.

tickets.title: Create KPI dashboards & metrics tracking
tickets.description: Build analytics dashboards for agent performance, revenue tracking, board quality metrics, and company KPIs.

tickets.title: Security audit — all agent workspaces
tickets.description: Comprehensive security audit of all 18 agent workspaces. Check for exposed keys, insecure configs, permission issues.

tickets.title: Setup bookkeeping system & expense tracking
tickets.description: Establish bookkeeping system for tracking all expenses, income, and financial records. Monthly reconciliation process.

tickets.title: Resource allocation & cost optimization
tickets.description: Create resource allocation framework. Identify free alternatives, optimize cloud costs, track spending across all workspaces.

tickets.title: External penetration testing
tickets.description: Engage external auditor for penetration testing of all public-facing services. Compliance report and remediation plan.

tickets.title: Build data pipelines & ETL processes
tickets.description: Design and build data pipelines for analytics. ETL processes for agent performance data, revenue data, and board metrics.

tickets.title: Team coordination & work delegation framework
tickets.description: Establish work delegation process, team coordination framework. Ensure all agents have clear tasks and no one is idle.

tickets.title: Agent performance metrics dashboard
tickets.description: Create a dashboard tracking agent productivity: tickets completed, time per task, success rate, idle time. Helps identify bottlenecks.

tickets.title: Revenue analytics & financial reporting
tickets.description: Build revenue tracking reports, burn rate analysis, runway projections, income per project breakdown. Daily/weekly financial summaries.

tickets.title: Board quality metrics & parity reports
tickets.description: Analyze Kanban vs Jira sync quality. Track sync latency, mismatch rates, duplicate detection. Weekly board health report.

tickets.title: Workload distribution analysis
tickets.description: Analyze ticket distribution across agents. Identify overloaded and underutilized agents. Recommend task rebalancing.

tickets.title: Code quality audit & cleanup
tickets.description: Review all agent workspace code for quality, consistency, and security. Fix lint issues, update dependencies, improve documentation.

tickets.title: Automate Kanban column sync with Jira
tickets.description: Build automated sync between Kanban board columns and Jira statuses. Eliminate manual mapping. Use iris-sync.py as foundation.

tickets.title: Dependency mapping for EPIC-008 revenue projects
tickets.description: Break down EPIC-008 revenue projects into child tasks with explicit owners and dependencies. Create visible task dependency graph.

tickets.title: Agent onboarding documentation
tickets.description: Create comprehensive onboarding docs for new agents: setup guide, role descriptions, workflow examples, best practices.

tickets.title: Setup Notion workspace & documentation structure
tickets.description: Create Notion workspace for Super Compagnie documentation. Set up pages for: Company Overview, Agent Roster, Project Tracker, Meeting Notes, Knowledge Base. Use the Notion API with the configured API key.

tickets.title: Notion MCP connector setup for GitHub sync
tickets.description: Configure Notion MCP connector to sync GitHub issues, PRs, and documentation. Connect the knowledge-base repo and openclaw-agents repo to Notion databases.

tickets.title: Sync Kanban tickets to Notion database
tickets.description: Create a Notion database that mirrors the Kanban board. Sync all tickets, epics, and agent statuses. Set up automated sync via the work executor.

tickets.title: Research Notion API integrations & best practices
tickets.description: Research Notion API capabilities, rate limits, best practices for documentation workflows. Evaluate Notion vs other tools for company knowledge management.

tickets.title: Setup Notion meeting notes & daily standup logs
tickets.description: Create Notion templates for daily standup logs, meeting notes, and weekly reviews. Automate posting from Discord cron jobs to Notion.
